news.summary: In an exciting collaboration, the Young Voices Education in Music Foundation has joined forces with Newark Public Schools in Newark, New Jersey. As of May 21, 2025, this partnership aims to provide top-tier music education to a total of 700 students within the district. This initiative covers the academic year of 2024-2025, reflecting a shared commitment to enhancing music learning opportunities for the youth in the community.
news.headline: Young Voices Education in Music empowers Newark Public Schools with music education for 700 students in 2024-2025.

news.summary: Debuting during Memorial Day weekend, the Space Needle introduces an innovative glass elevator for an unparalleled experience. Located in Seattle, the iconic landmark revealed its latest feature on May 23, 2025. This new elevator allows visitors to ascend above the city in a unique manner, providing floor-to-ceiling views.
news.headline: Seattle's Space Needle introduces new double deck elevator, offering visitors an ultimate glass experience. Opening on Memorial Day weekend. May 23, 2025.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025 in Tokyo, the 41st WHO Sasakawa Health Prize was awarded to Dr. Merete Nordentoft, a Danish psychiatrist, for her efforts in youth suicide prevention. The prestigious prize was presented during the 78th World Health Assembly in Geneva. Dr. Nordentoft's groundbreaking work in this field has been recognized globally, emphasizing the importance of her contributions.
news.headline: Dr. Merete Nordentoft of Denmark wins 41st WHO Sasakawa Health Prize for suicide prevention in youth at 78th World Health Assembly.

news.summary: Compass Mining, a prominent provider of Bitcoin mining infrastructure and services, has made an initial donation to support a hospital and village in Nigeria. This contribution marks the beginning of their partnership with Synota, and they plan to extend their support in the future. The donation was announced on May 23, 2025, from their headquarters in Wilmington, Del. The exact amount of the donation was not disclosed but is expected to significantly impact the local community. This philanthropic effort showcases Compass Mining's commitment to improving healthcare and infrastructure in developing regions.
news.headline: Compass Mining partners with Synota, donates to Nigeria hospital & village. Plans further expansion. #Bitcoin #ImpactMining #Donation.

news.summary: Las Vegas is gearing up for its seventh annual contests with the biggest prize pool ever, featuring the ultra-luxe Circa Grandissimo with a hefty $100,000 entry fee. Signups for the contests start today at all Circa Sports locations in Nevada. This year's event is set to be the most prestigious yet, attracting participants and fans from around the world. Get ready to witness record-breaking numbers and intense competition as the excitement unfolds in the casino capital of the world.

news.summary: Thousands of Purina employees across 34 cities in the United States recently participated in the company's annual day of service. The initiative, called Purina Day, saw employees volunteering their time to support various community needs. The event took place in 34 different US cities, with a total of several thousand employees actively taking part. This year's Purina Day was a successful endeavor that allowed employees to make a positive impact in their communities.
news.headline: Purina donates 30,000+ pounds of food & 5,000+ volunteer hours in 34 US cities during 24th Purina Cares Day.

news.summary: A two-day conference focused on accelerating translational and clinical research for rare diseases will be held by the National Organization for Rare Disorders (NORD®) in Washington on May 23, 2025. The event will bring together prominent figures in science, industry, and regulation to discuss strategies for addressing rare diseases.
news.headline: Dr. Vinay Prasad to keynote NORD's Rare Disease Symposium; aims to speed up research with top experts.

news.summary: As the "One Big Beautiful Bill" progresses to the Senate, investors should prepare for ongoing volatility in Treasury yields, according to Jim Cramer. The host of "Mad Money" cautioned that the market may approach a 4.75% yield on the 10-year Treasury, advising investors to adjust to the fluctuation. Cramer directly addressed the expected market response to the legislative process, mentioning that there may be more challenging days ahead as the bill moves through the Senate. He expressed his belief in sustained upward pressure on yields during this period. Despite the predicted challenges, Cramer remains optimistic about the long-term market outlook. He encouraged investors by stating, "We will have to endure more torture over the senate and more days where we 'flirt' with 4.75% for the ten. Get used to it…" Cramer's full analysis can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Cramer warns of more volatility as 10-year yields near 4.75% amid bill move to Senate. Market advised to brace for impact.

news.summary: According to a recent analysis, the increasing budget deficit is expected to result in future hikes in taxes, despite the current decrease in tax rates. To navigate this uncertainty, one should consider applying the investing principle of diversification to their financial strategies.
news.headline: Tax cuts may result in higher rates in the future due to the growing budget deficit. Protect yourself by diversifying.

news.summary: Today, Wix.com Ltd. (Nasdaq: WIX) revealed the acquisition of Hour One, a trailblazer in generative AI media creation. This strategic move solidifies Wix's position as a leader in AI-powered digital experiences. The acquisition provides Wix with cutting-edge technologies that will influence the future of web and visual design creation. Wix's global status as the top SaaS website builder platform further enhances this milestone.
news.headline: Wix (Nasdaq: WIX) acquires Hour One for generative AI capabilities, advancing as AI frontrunner in digital design.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025, Roche disclosed that the CHMP has given a favorable opinion for Itovebi™, inavolisib, when used alongside palbociclib (Ibrance®) and fulvestrant. This combination is intended for treating adult patients with PIK3CA-mutated, ER-positive, HER2-negative, locally advanced, or metastatic breast cancer after recurrence on or within 12 months post completing adjuvant endocrine therapy. If greenlit, this regimen could revolutionize the standard of care in this initial line of treatment, which currently has limited options available. The European Commission is anticipated to make the final decision on approval soon. Roche's stocks are listed as SIX: RO, ROG; OTCQX: RHHBY.
news.headline: CHMP recommends EU approval of Roche's Itovebi for PIK3CA-mutated, ER+ HER2- advanced breast cancer, potential standard of care.

news.summary: ESGL has submitted a proxy for their merger with De Tomaso. An Extraordinary General Meeting (EGM) is scheduled for June 10 to vote on the approval of plans for creating a luxury and sustainability-focused company to be listed on Nasdaq.
news.headline: ESGL files proxy for merger with De Tomaso. EGM vote on June 10 for Nasdaq-listed luxury and sustainability entity.

news.summary: Digital asset lender Ledn is shifting to fully collateralized Bitcoin lending and discontinuing Ethereum support to streamline its business and enhance client asset security. Ledn will now hold Bitcoin collateral in full custody to prevent rehypothecation, aligning with Bitcoin's principles against fractional reserve banking. With Bitcoin representing over 99% of Ledn's activity, the company is simplifying its focus on Bitcoin. Founded in 2018, Ledn has a loan book value of $9.9 billion, catering to Bitcoin holders seeking liquidity without selling assets. Bitcoin's price has surpassed $111,000, prompting investors to borrow against their holdings instead of selling. Institutional adoption of Bitcoin, notably through spot ETFs, has increased, although some banking sectors fear blockchain innovations like yield-bearing stablecoins challenging their business models. This development signifies the evolving landscape of digital assets in traditional finance.
news.headline: Ledn shifts to Bitcoin loans only, discontinues Ethereum support. Loanbook value at $9.9B. Bitcoin price at $111,000. Banking lobby wary of yield-bearing stablecoins. Retail abandoning Bitcoin for institutions.

news.summary: Forte Minerals has revealed plans for a private placement worth C$2.4 million, intended to finance exploration endeavors in Peru and cover operational expenses. There is a possibility for the placement to reach C$2.7 million. The closing date for the funding round is scheduled for June 15, 2025.
news.headline: Forte Minerals to raise C$2.4M in private placement for Peru exploration, with potential increase to C$2.7M by June 15, 2025.

news.summary: Lyten, a supermaterial applications company based in San Jose, California, has introduced Lyten Motorsports in collaboration with INDYCAR Experience in Indianapolis. This new venture aims to incorporate Lyten's innovative 3D Graphene technology into motorsports components. With over 25 years of experience supplying materials to motorsports events globally, Lyten Motorsports is set to revolutionize the industry. The company's 3D Graphene, a carbon-derived material, will serve as a fundamental element in the development of high-performance parts for motorsports.
news.headline: Lyten introduces Lyten Motorsports with 3D Graphene for racing in partnership with INDYCAR Experience.

news.summary: Atlanta and New York-based Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE: ICE), a prominent technology and data services provider, has unveiled its April 2025 First Look report. This report highlights the status of U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) mortgages as they move towards foreclosure after the moratorium expiry. The data is sourced from ICE's loan-level database, encompassing a significant portion of the U.S. mortgage market. The report includes key metrics such as month-end delinquency rates, foreclosure trends, and prepayment statistics.
news.headline: ICE reports on VA mortgages, with foreclosure activity increasing after record lows. Delinquency and prepayment stats included.

news.summary: In San Mateo, California, Backblaze, Inc. (Nasdaq: BLZE) released its Q1 2025 Drive Stats report. The report analyzed 317,833 hard drives supporting its cloud storage solutions globally, managing over four exabytes of data. news.headline: Backblaze released Q1 2025 Drive Stats report analyzing 317,833 hard drives, representing 4 exabytes of data managed.

news.summary: A new report on the construction market in Greece predicts growth in various sectors: commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential. news.summary: BetUS, a popular online gambling platform in the US, has gained a strong reputation for its reliability and game selection. Established in 1994, it offers a wide range of real money games, including slots, live dealer tables, and classic casino games. The platform is known for its easy and secure login process, featuring mobile-friendly options and demo play for risk-free gaming. With a variety of payment methods, including cryptocurrencies, BetUS ensures fast and secure payouts for its users. Despite some drawbacks such as no dedicated mobile app and higher wagering requirements on bonuses, BetUS remains a top choice for American players. To sign up on BetUS, users can visit the official website, fill out the registration form, verify their email, make a deposit, and claim the welcome bonus. Overall, BetUS stands out as a reliable and reputable online casino option in the US market.
news.headline: BetUS is a top US online casino with over 30 years of trusted reputation, offering a wide range of games and crypto-friendly transactions.

news.summary: Following a four-week trial, Chad Reeves and Reese Hopkin have been acquitted by a jury on charges of Battery Causing Serious Injury and Personal Infliction of Serious Injury. The trial sparked widespread attention due to the video and ended with both defendants being found "Not Guilty" by the jury.
news.headline: Chad Reeves and Reese Hopkin acquitted in Dodger Stadium beating case after 4-week trial for Battery Causing Serious Injury and Personal Infliction of Serious Injury.

news.summary: Spot Bitcoin ETFs in the US are seeing a surge in inflows, with over $1.5 billion recorded in just two days - $608 million on May 21 and $934 million on May 22. If this trend continues, monthly inflows could hit $6.68 billion, breaking the record of $6.49 billion set in November 2024. These inflows have helped drive Bitcoin to a new all-time high of $112,000 on May 22. Institutional demand is on the rise, with growing profits signaling Bitcoin's shift from alternative to benchmark asset. Recent ETF demand coincided with $1 billion worth of Bitcoin being withdrawn from Coinbase on May 9, indicating increasing institutional interest. Bitwise predicts Bitcoin could hit $200,000 by 2025 and even $1 million by 2029, potentially surpassing gold in market cap. Despite being the fifth-largest asset with a market cap of $2.2 trillion, Bitcoin still lags behind gold's $22.3 trillion market cap.
news.headline: US Bitcoin ETFs see major inflows of $1.5B in two days, heading towards record month as BTC hits new highs on rising institutional demand.

news.summary: DICK'S Sporting Goods, Inc. will announce its Q1 earnings before the market opens on May 28. Analysts predict earnings of $4.33 per share and revenue of $3.6 billion. On May 15, Foot Locker, Inc. confirmed its acquisition by DICK'S for $2.4 billion in equity and $2.5 billion enterprise value. Investors are also interested in DICK'S dividends, currently at an annual yield of 2.81%, with quarterly payouts at $1.21 per share. The acquisition news has generated investor interest in potential gains. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Dick's Sporting Goods to report Q1 earnings; expected to earn $4.33/share, revenue $3.6 billion. Offer 2.81% annual dividend.

news.summary: Clip Money Inc., a company trading under TSX-V: CLIP and OTCQB: CLPMF, has released its financial results for the three-month period ending on March 31, 2025. They have observed a significant uptick in revenue, showing a growth of 225% compared to the first quarter of 2024. Meanwhile, their cost of revenues experienced a more modest increase of 35% during the same period. This has resulted in the company maintaining a high operating leverage as they transition into the new year, showcasing strong performance in their operations.
news.headline: Clip Money Inc. saw revenue increase by 225% in Q1 2025 compared to Q1 2024, with operating costs rising by only 35%.
